plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Azure OpenAI ts Local Debug
plan_metadata.description: Basic Custom Engine Azure OpenAI ts Local Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents interface.
Click the "Basic Custom Engine Agent" option in the dropdown menu to select an intelligent agent description within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "TypeScript" option in the programming language dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" input field under the "Workspace Folder" dialog to interact with the directory selection path.
